services.title: Residential Cleaning
services.summary: Comprehensive home cleaning services tailored to your needs. From regular maintenance to deep cleaning.
services.overview: Keep your home consistently fresh, tidy, and comfortable. We focus on the details that make a space feel truly clean — from high-touch areas to the corners that are easy to miss.
included: Dusting and wipe-down of surfaces and high-touch points
Kitchen cleaning (counters, exterior appliances, sink, stovetop)
idealFor: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning schedules

services.title: Commercial Cleaning
services.summary: Professional office and commercial space cleaning. Maintain a pristine work environment for your team.
services.overview: A clean workplace supports productivity, professionalism, and healthier teams. We tailor checklists around your space, traffic levels, and operating hours.
included: Common area, lobby, and office cleaning
idealFor: Offices, studios, retail spaces, and clinics

services.title: Deep Cleaning
services.summary: Intensive cleaning that reaches every corner. Perfect for seasonal refreshes or move-in/move-out.
services.overview: When your space needs a reset, deep cleaning targets built-up grime and overlooked areas. It’s a great starting point before moving into a regular maintenance schedule.
included: Baseboards, door frames, and light switch wipe-down
Extra attention to corners, edges, and hard-to-reach areas
Floor detailing (edges and under light furniture when accessible)

services.title: Window Cleaning
services.summary: Crystal-clear windows inside and out. We make your windows shine and let the light in.
services.overview: Brighten your space with streak-free, professional window cleaning. We focus on clarity, detailing, and leaving frames and sills looking refreshed.
idealFor: Improving natural light and curb appeal

services.title: Carpet & Upholstery
services.summary: Professional carpet and furniture cleaning. Remove stains, dirt, and allergens effectively.
services.overview: Extend the life of your carpets and furniture with a thorough clean that lifts embedded dirt and freshens fabrics. We tailor the approach to the material and condition.
included: Targeted spot treatment for common stains (as appropriate)
Deep cleaning for carpets, rugs, and upholstery
idealFor: Refreshing couches, chairs, and area rugs

services.title: Disinfection Services
services.summary: Advanced sanitization and disinfection. Keep your space safe and hygienic.
services.overview: Disinfection focuses on sanitizing high-touch points and shared areas to help reduce the spread of germs. Ideal as a recurring add-on or for specific situations.
included: Disinfection of high-touch surfaces (handles, switches, counters)
Focus on shared spaces and frequently used areas

services.title: Move-In / Move-Out
services.summary: A detailed reset for empty homes and apartments. Perfect for tenants, landlords, and realtors.
services.overview: Moving is stressful — cleaning shouldn’t be. We focus on inside surfaces, fixtures, and touchpoints to leave the place fresh for the next chapter.
included: Trash removal and final walkthrough touch-ups

services.title: Post-Construction Cleaning
services.summary: Remove dust and debris after renovations. We make your new space ready to enjoy.
services.overview: Renovations leave behind fine dust that settles everywhere. We detail surfaces and floors so your space looks finished — not like a job site.
included: Dust removal from surfaces, ledges, and fixtures
Vacuuming and mopping floors (with edge detailing)
Wipe-down of doors, frames, and reachable vents
Spot cleaning for paint splatter residue (where safe)
idealFor: After flooring, drywall, or painting projects

banners.title: Get 20% Off Your First Deep Clean
banners.description: Book this week and enjoy a premium deep clean at a special rate.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: Renora has been cleaning my home for over two years now. Their attention to detail is incredible, and I always come home to a sparkling clean house. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: We've been using Renora for our office cleaning, and the difference is remarkable. Professional, reliable, and always on time. Our workspace has never looked better.

testimonials.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.content: Managing multiple properties, I need a cleaning service I can trust. Renora delivers consistently excellent results across all our locations. True professionals!

hero.headline: Spotless Spaces,
hero.subheadline: Experience the gold standard in professional cleaning. Renora delivers exceptional results for your home and business.

about.title: Your Trusted Cleaning Partner
paragraphs: With over a decade of experience, Renora has been setting the gold standard in cleaning services. Our commitment to excellence and attention to detail has made us the preferred choice for hundreds of satisfied clients.
We use eco-friendly products and the latest cleaning techniques to ensure your space is not only clean but also safe for your family, employees, and the environment.
